rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Orders Striking Second Amended Complaint And Dismissing Case
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 8, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF FAST CAPITAL, LLC., PAUL ARAND, ROBERT FRAZIER, ROBERT VANDERWALL, KRISTIN KEENCE, DANIEL KIM, CA CAPITAL FUNDS FOR 284 ROOSEVELT WAY TRUST Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Orders Striking Second Amended Complaint And Dismissing Case By no later than 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief not to exceed 1 page addressing Leader v. Health Industries (2001) 89 Cal.App.4th 603 and Plaintiff's counsel to file a declaration addressing May 28, 2019 Order Granting Motion to Strike in Alameda County case RG18906862. By no later than 9:00 a.m. Defendant to file a declaration regarding costs and fees incurred addressing the improperly Second Amended Complaint. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MART BAILEY VS. MARTIN YUDOWITZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 8, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MARTIN YUDOWITZ, CAROL GRAHAM MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS continued to September 4, 2019 on Court's own motion. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after September 4, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date. The notification may be provided to department 501 at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 8:00 a.m. on August 8, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHENG H CHAN VS. DEREK KONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 8, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT DEREK KONG, XUEYING DU MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. Moving party failed to cite or analyze the law regarding the timing for the minor child's presence at the premises, i.e. is the operative time, the time of the service of the Notice; or is it within 15/30 days of service; is the date of receipt of the Notice, etc. Further no evidence is presented that the child was present at the premises at any time prior to April 17, 2019, almost a month after the Notice has been served. = (501/CFH)
